$meta.step: Step 2 — Design System and UX Foundation
$meta.description: Spacing scale on a strict 4px grid.

space.0.description: Spacing step 0 on the 4px grid (0px). All spacing derives from this scale; arbitrary spacing values are forbidden.

space.1.description: Spacing step 1 on the 4px grid (4px). All spacing derives from this scale; arbitrary spacing values are forbidden.

space.2.description: Spacing step 2 on the 4px grid (8px). All spacing derives from this scale; arbitrary spacing values are forbidden.

space.3.description: Spacing step 3 on the 4px grid (12px). All spacing derives from this scale; arbitrary spacing values are forbidden.

space.4.description: Spacing step 4 on the 4px grid (16px). All spacing derives from this scale; arbitrary spacing values are forbidden.

space.5.description: Spacing step 5 on the 4px grid (20px). All spacing derives from this scale; arbitrary spacing values are forbidden.

space.6.description: Spacing step 6 on the 4px grid (24px). All spacing derives from this scale; arbitrary spacing values are forbidden.

space.8.description: Spacing step 8 on the 4px grid (32px). All spacing derives from this scale; arbitrary spacing values are forbidden.

space.10.description: Spacing step 10 on the 4px grid (40px). All spacing derives from this scale; arbitrary spacing values are forbidden.

space.12.description: Spacing step 12 on the 4px grid (48px). All spacing derives from this scale; arbitrary spacing values are forbidden.

space.16.description: Spacing step 16 on the 4px grid (64px). All spacing derives from this scale; arbitrary spacing values are forbidden.

space.20.description: Spacing step 20 on the 4px grid (80px). All spacing derives from this scale; arbitrary spacing values are forbidden.

space.24.description: Spacing step 24 on the 4px grid (96px). All spacing derives from this scale; arbitrary spacing values are forbidden.

space.grid.base.description: The base unit of the spacing grid. Every spacing token is an integer multiple of this value.
